do_not_merge.reason: Person/title vs agency: entity_ny-sdod-lga-aa represents the New York State Department of Transportation as a government agency, while entity_ny-state-dot represents the Commissioner of Transportation (a person/title) based on evidence (nameplate with 'Commissioner of Transportation'). Under Identity Merge Canon, person/title vs agency never merge (test 1, contradiction). The shared identity key is overridden by the actual object type.

suggestion.rationale: The two records denote different real-world objects: one is the NYSDOT agency, the other is a commissioner (person). Despite sharing an identity key, the evidence clearly shows they are not the same canonical entity. The canon explicitly forbids merging person/title with agency.
